prompt: Review the provided diff against .specify/memory/constitution.md (v1.0.0). The diff adds GET /api/v1/users/[username] with full RBAC (authorization.can + filterOutput) and two integration tests (happy path + 403 denial). No migrations, no secret leaks, error shape preserved.

assertions.text: Recognizes Principle II compliance via authorization.can + filterOutput
Recognizes Principle III compliance via the two integration test scenarios
Does NOT invent a Principle I, IV, or V violation
Returns final verdict PR-ready: yes (or equivalent)
